title: GatewayPolicy v1
description: Machine-readable schema for one trusted gateway policy binding a servicing node to an accountable organization in the host-ledger settlement rail.

policy/id.description: Stable identifier of the gateway policy.

created-at.description: Timestamp when the gateway policy became auditable.

federation/id.description: Federation scope in which the gateway policy applies.

gateway/node-id.description: Node currently serving the trusted gateway role under this policy.

operator/org-ref.description: Accountable organization operating the gateway policy.

settlement/unit.description: Internal settlement unit handled by this gateway policy in MVP.

supported/directions.description: Permitted directions for fiat-to-credit or credit-to-fiat boundary crossings.

kyc/mode.description: High-level compliance posture applied to payout or top-up flows.

payout/manual-review.description: Whether outbound settlement may require manual review under this policy.

external/providers.description: Named external payment providers or rails admitted under this policy.

status.description: Administrative lifecycle state of the gateway policy.

suspended-at.description: Timestamp when the gateway policy was suspended, if applicable.

retired-at.description: Timestamp when the gateway policy was retired, if applicable.
